title: Hiring Medical Officer at RML Hospital Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at RML Hospital Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at RML Hospital Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RML Hospital Holdings Services:
RML Hospital Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
